---
name: Bad Recommendation
about: Report a query where the verdict or ranking felt clearly wrong
title: "[Bad recommendation] "

---

## Query

What did you ask Repostitch?

## What happened

What verdict or repo recommendation did you get?

## Why it felt wrong

Tell us what felt off:

- wrong verdict
- wrong top repo
- misleading evidence
- pack scope mismatch

## What you expected instead

What should have happened?

## Extra context

Links, screenshots, or related repos are welcome.
